channel.title: The World on The Moonshroud Realms
channel.description: Recent content in The World on The Moonshroud Realms

item.title: Bridgeport
item.description:
Bridgeport#

Bridgeport is a freehold city of approximately 8,000 souls situated at the mouth of the Godsfall River where it meets Pell’s Harbor, on the western coast of Algar. It is a city of commerce, ambition, and barely contained chaos — a place where fortunes are made and lost, where every faction has a foothold, and where the streets themselves seem to have opinions.

Governance#

Bridgeport is governed by the Council of Trades, a body of merchant representatives whose authority derives from coin rather than crown. The current High Convenor is Seraphina Velcross, a sharp political mind who maintains an uneasy balance between the city’s many competing interests.

item.title: Wexford
item.description:
Wexford#

Wexford is a walled woodland town of approximately 1,000 souls, situated some fifty miles south of Bridgeport in the depths of the Wexwood Forest. It sits at the confluence of the Wex River and Spring Creek, and is predominantly home to the Aelfaen — though travellers, traders, and those with business in the forest pass through regularly enough that outsiders are not unknown.

It is a quieter place than Bridgeport, but quieter does not mean simple.
